# TooliVerse

> AI-powered workplace productivity suite — automate emails, meeting notes, task planning and research.

## Pages
- [Dashboard](/): Productivity dashboard with usage metrics and recent activity
- [Email Generator](/email): Generate professional emails by tone and audience
- [Meeting Summarizer](/summarizer): Extract decisions, action items, and owners from meeting notes
- [Task Planner](/planner): Eisenhower-matrix prioritization and daily/weekly scheduling
- [Research Assistant](/research): AI-generated executive briefs from topics or content
- [AI Chatbot](/chat): Conversational workplace productivity assistant
- [Productivity Impact](/impact): How TooliVerse delivers measurable time savings
- [Responsible AI](/responsible-ai): Principles for safe and ethical AI use
- [About](/about): Project objective, features, and approach
